name: opencode-agent-intercom-tui
description: Visible sidebar panel for opencode-agent-intercom: live subagent list with keyboard navigation, open-session and abort
comment: @opentui/*, solid-js and @opencode-ai/plugin are intentionally NOT peerDependencies — opencode provides them at runtime. Listing them as peerDependencies makes npm install a copy that shadows opencode's own (and @opentui/core@0.2.10 ships a broken chunk). They stay devDependencies for building and typechecking only.
